title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
excerpt: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.
content_html:
Runway no longer wants to be just another AI model company. It wants to become the infrastructure layer for generative media.

On Thursday, the startup launched Runway Media Router through Runway Dev, its developer platform, released earlier this month, that provides API access to a growing roster of third-party image, video, and audio models alongside Runway’s own. 

The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed, or cost. While model routers have become increasingly common in the world of large language models, Runway says this is the first built specifically for generative media. 

“The routing really fits into that overall promise of being the easiest one-stop shop for developers to integrate with any type of generative media model,” Anthony Maggio, Runway’s chief product officer, told TechCrunch.

The launch, shared exclusively with TechCrunch, marks another step in Runway’s evolution from an AI video startup into infrastructure for companies building with generative media. Through Runway Dev, customers including Adobe, Cloudflare, ElevenLabs, Expedia, Shutterstock, and Quora can build media generation directly into their own products using Runway’s API rather than sending their users to Runway’s own app or site.

The launch of the router comes as the number of generative media models has exploded, making it increasingly difficult and time-consuming for developers to evaluate new releases. Through the Runway Dev platform, developers can access the latest media models when they’re released. 

“Most developers are not spending the time to really understand the capabilities of each of these models and where they excel or differ based on various types of outputs across video, image, and audio,” Maggio said. “The unique proposition we’re bringing to the table is all of that intelligence around what the best model is for each different use case, and meshing that with preference you apply around the context of your business.”

Maggio noted that Chinese generative media models are becoming increasingly popular. However, many businesses building their own products might not be comfortable working with models that come out of China, so they could, he said, potentially set a preference for American model providers — a preference that may become more common as the Trump administration explores bans and sanctions against Chinese open AI models. 

That’s just one example of preferences that developers can set, though. Maggio says customers are mainly interested in routing the model to account for token pricing and quality. Token pricing has become a hot topic in 2026 as enterprises that went all-in on agentic AI felt the sting of high token bills. In the world of LLMs, model routing for token pricing has become common, so it only makes sense that routing for generative media would follow. The Media Router launch also comes weeks after Runway replaced its unlimited subscription plans with token-based pricing, a move that drew criticism from some users. 

On the quality front, deciding which models provide the best quality for any given task isn’t as easy for generative media as it is with language models, Maggio says. That’s where the router’s intelligence layer kicks in. It’s based on the expertise Runway’s in-house creative team has developed in evaluating output across every media type — things like how video models handle motion, how image models handle composition, or how voice models handle lip syncing. 

Runway had already done a lot of the work building that intelligence layer for its agent product, a conversational AI creative partner that Runway launched in May to help turn text prompts into fully edited multi-shot videos and marketing campaigns. 

The Runway Media Router, Maggio says, takes the same routing technology Runway built for its own products and packages it for outside developers to use.

Runway’s strategy today reflects how fragmented and competitive the current generative media landscape is, and how much the startup needs to expand and pivot to stay competitive. Runway’s last AI video model release — Gen 4.5 — was in December. At the time, the model topped leaderboards, outperforming similar models from incumbents like Google. In the same month, Runway released its first world model. 

Aside from an upgrade to its video editing model, Aleph 2.0, in May, Runway hasn’t dropped a new dedicated frontier video model in months. (TechCrunch has asked when the startup plans to release Gen 5.) Today, while Aleph 2.0 ranks among the leading video editing models according to Artificial Analysis, the company’s text-to-video and image-to-video models no longer lead the rankings. In the top 20 spots are models from heavy hitters like Google and China’s ByteDance and Alibaba. 

Rather than asking developers to bet on a single model staying ahead, Media Router assumes that the best model will continue to change — and it keeps Runway in the game so that it can continue to build on the frontier. If not as the best new AI model, then as the best orchestration layer. 

Anastasis Germanidis, Runway’s co-founder and co-CEO, acknowledged that the startup has been known for a long time primarily for “that end user piece,” but it had to build a full stack to get there, one that includes a developer platform, a creative tool suite, and an inference layer underneath it all. He says the company has seen increasing interest from companies for Runway to live across every part of that stack. 

“You need great models underneath, but the orchestration increasingly matters a lot because people are building entire campaigns with those models, or they’re building entire finished multi-scene generations out of those models,” Germanidis told TechCrunch. “It’s something that we increasingly had to build — that intelligence layer that comes on top of the pure pixel models. The router is one way in which the benefits of that come to users.”

Or as Maggio put it more broadly: “If you zoom out at the one thing Runway has been doing since 2018, it’s that we’re deeply focused on research, while building for where we think the space is going at the same time.”

Got a sensitive tip or confidential documents? Rebecca Bellan is reporting on the inner workings of the AI industry, from the companies shaping its future to the people impacted by their decisions. Contact her securely, and off the record, on Signal at rebeccabellan.491 or via email at rebecca.bellan@techcrunch.com from a non-work device.

When you purchase through links in our articles, we may earn a small commission. This doesn’t affect our editorial independence.

sentences.zh: 它希望成为生成媒体的基础设施层。

blocks.html_en: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed, or cost. While model routers have become increasingly common in the world of large language models, Runway says this is the first built specifically for generative media.

blocks.html_en: The launch of the router comes as the number of generative media models has exploded, making it increasingly difficult and time-consuming for developers to evaluate new releases. Through the Runway Dev platform, developers can access the latest media models when they’re released.

sentences.en: The launch of the router comes as the number of generative media models has exploded, making it increasingly difficult and time-consuming for developers to evaluate new releases.
sentences.zh: 该路由器的推出正值生成媒体模型数量爆炸式增长之际，这使得开发人员评估新版本变得越来越困难和耗时。

sentences.en: Through the Runway Dev platform, developers can access the latest media models when they’re released.
sentences.zh: 通过 Runway Dev 平台，开发人员可以在最新的媒体模型发布时访问它们。

sentences.en: “The unique proposition we’re bringing to the table is all of that intelligence around what the best model is for each different use case, and meshing that with preference you apply around the context of your business.”
sentences.zh: “我们提出的独特主张是围绕每个不同用例的最佳模型的所有情报，并将其与您在业务环境中应用的偏好相结合。”

blocks.html_en: Maggio noted that Chinese generative media models are becoming increasingly popular. However, many businesses building their own products might not be comfortable working with models that come out of China, so they could, he said, potentially set a preference for American model providers — a preference that may become more common as the Trump administration explores bans and sanctions against Chinese open AI models.

sentences.zh: 马吉奥指出，中国的生成媒体模式正变得越来越受欢迎。

sentences.en: However, many businesses building their own products might not be comfortable working with models that come out of China, so they could, he said, potentially set a preference for American model providers — a preference that may become more common as the Trump administration explores bans and sanctions against Chinese open AI models.
sentences.zh: 然而，许多开发自己产品的企业可能不愿意使用来自中国的模型，因此他说，他们可能会优先选择美国模型提供商——随着特朗普政府探索对中国开放人工智能模型的禁令和制裁，这种偏好可能会变得更加普遍。

sentences.en: That’s just one example of preferences that developers can set, though.
sentences.zh: 不过，这只是开发人员可以设置的首选项之一。

sentences.en: Maggio says customers are mainly interested in routing the model to account for token pricing and quality.
sentences.zh: Maggio 表示，客户主要感兴趣的是路由模型以考虑代币定价和质量。

sentences.en: Token pricing has become a hot topic in 2026 as enterprises that went all-in on agentic AI felt the sting of high token bills.
sentences.zh: 代币定价已成为 2026 年的热门话题，因为全力投入代理人工智能的企业感受到了高额代币账单的刺痛。

sentences.en: In the world of LLMs, model routing for token pricing has become common, so it only makes sense that routing for generative media would follow.
sentences.zh: 在法学硕士的世界中，代币定价的模型路由已经变得很常见，因此生成媒体的路由也随之而来才有意义。

sentences.en: The Media Router launch also comes weeks after Runway replaced its unlimited subscription plans with token-based pricing, a move that drew criticism from some users.
sentences.zh: 媒体路由器推出几周前，Runway 将其无限订阅计划改为基于代币的定价，此举招致了一些用户的批评。

blocks.html_en: On the quality front, deciding which models provide the best quality for any given task isn’t as easy for generative media as it is with language models, Maggio says. That’s where the router’s intelligence layer kicks in. sentences.en: That’s where the router’s intelligence layer kicks in.
sentences.zh: 这就是路由器智能层发挥作用的地方。

sentences.en: It’s based on the expertise Runway’s in-house creative team has developed in evaluating output across every media type — things like how video models handle motion, how image models handle composition, or how voice models handle lip syncing.
sentences.zh: 它基于 Runway 内部创意团队在评估每种媒体类型的输出方面开发的专业知识，例如视频模型如何处理运动、图像模型如何处理构图或语音模型如何处理口型同步。

blocks.html_en: Runway had already done a lot of the work building that intelligence layer for its agent product, a conversational AI creative partner that Runway launched in May to help turn text prompts into fully edited multi-shot videos and marketing campaigns.

sentences.en: Runway had already done a lot of the work building that intelligence layer for its agent product, a conversational AI creative partner that Runway launched in May to help turn text prompts into fully edited multi-shot videos and marketing campaigns.
sentences.zh: Runway 已经为其代理产品构建了智能层，这是 Runway 在 5 月份推出的对话式 AI 创意合作伙伴，旨在帮助将文本提示转变为完全编辑的多镜头视频和营销活动。

blocks.html_en: The Runway Media Router, Maggio says, takes the same routing technology Runway built for its own products and packages it for outside developers to use.

sentences.en: He says the company has seen increasing interest from companies for Runway to live across every part of that stack.
sentences.zh: 他表示，公司发现越来越多的公司对 Runway 的兴趣越来越浓厚，希望能够覆盖该堆栈的各个部分。

blocks.html_en: “You need great models underneath, but the orchestration increasingly matters a lot because people are building entire campaigns with those models, or they’re building entire finished multi-scene generations out of those models,” Germanidis told TechCrunch. “It’s something that we increasingly had to build — that intelligence layer that comes on top of the pure pixel models. The router is one way in which the benefits of that come to users.”

sentences.en: “You need great models underneath, but the orchestration increasingly matters a lot because people are building entire campaigns with those models, or they’re building entire finished multi-scene generations out of those models,” Germanidis told TechCrunch.
sentences.zh: “底层需要出色的模型，但编排变得越来越重要，因为人们正在使用这些模型构建整个营销活动，或者他们正在利用这些模型构建完整的多场景生成，”Germanidis 告诉 TechCrunch。

sentences.en: “It’s something that we increasingly had to build — that intelligence layer that comes on top of the pure pixel models.
sentences.zh: “这是我们越来越需要构建的东西——位于纯像素模型之上的智能层。

sentences.en: The router is one way in which the benefits of that come to users.”
sentences.zh: 路由器是让用户受益的一种方式。”

blocks.html_en: Or as Maggio put it more broadly: “If you zoom out at the one thing Runway has been doing since 2018, it’s that we’re deeply focused on research, while building for where we think the space is going at the same time.”

sentences.en: Or as Maggio put it more broadly: “If you zoom out at the one thing Runway has been doing since 2018, it’s that we’re deeply focused on research, while building for where we think the space is going at the same time.”
sentences.zh: 或者正如 Maggio 更广泛地说的那样：“如果你仔细观察 Runway 自 2018 年以来一直在做的一件事，那就是我们非常专注于研究，同时为我们认为的空间发展方向进行建设。”

content_html_zh:
Runway 不再只想成为另一家人工智能模型公司。 它希望成为生成媒体的基础设施层。

周四，这家初创公司通过本月早些时候发布的开发者平台 Runway Dev 推出了 Runway Media Router，该平台提供了对越来越多的第三方图像、视频和音频模型以及 Runway 自己的模型的 API 访问。

媒体路由器是一种工具，可以根据开发人员是否优先考虑质量、速度或成本来自动为请求选择最佳图像、视频或音频生成模型。 虽然模型路由器在大型语言模型领域变得越来越普遍，但 Runway 表示，这是第一个专门为生成媒体构建的路由器。

Runway 首席产品官 Anthony Maggio 告诉 TechCrunch：“该路由确实符合作为开发者与任何类型的生成媒体模型集成的最简单的一站式商店的整体承诺。”

此次发布由 TechCrunch 独家分享，标志着 Runway 从人工智能视频初创公司向生成媒体构建公司的基础设施发展又迈出了一步。 通过 Runway Dev，包括 Adob​​e、Cloudflare、ElevenLabs、Expedia、Shutterstock 和 Quora 在内的客户可以使用 Runway 的 API 将媒体生成直接构建到自己的产品中，而不是将用户发送到 Runway 自己的应用程序或网站。

该路由器的推出正值生成媒体模型数量爆炸式增长之际，这使得开发人员评估新版本变得越来越困难和耗时。 通过 Runway Dev 平台，开发人员可以在最新的媒体模型发布时访问它们。

Maggio 说：“大多数开发人员并没有花时间真正了解这些模型的功能，以及它们在视频、图像和音频的各种输出类型方面的优势或不同之处。” “我们提出的独特主张是围绕每个不同用例的最佳模型的所有情报，并将其与您在业务环境中应用的偏好相结合。”

马吉奥指出，中国的生成媒体模式正变得越来越受欢迎。 然而，许多开发自己产品的企业可能不愿意使用来自中国的模型，因此他说，他们可能会优先选择美国模型提供商——随着特朗普政府探索对中国开放人工智能模型的禁令和制裁，这种偏好可能会变得更加普遍。

不过，这只是开发人员可以设置的首选项之一。 Maggio 表示，客户主要感兴趣的是路由模型以考虑代币定价和质量。 代币定价已成为 2026 年的热门话题，因为全力投入代理人工智能的企业感受到了高额代币账单的刺痛。 在法学硕士的世界中，代币定价的模型路由已经变得很常见，因此生成媒体的路由也随之而来才有意义。 媒体路由器推出几周前，Runway 将其无限订阅计划改为基于代币的定价，此举招致了一些用户的批评。

马吉奥说，在质量方面，对于生成媒体来说，决定哪种模型能够为任何给定任务提供最佳质量并不像语言模型那么容易。 这就是路由器智能层发挥作用的地方。 它基于 Runway 内部创意团队在评估每种媒体类型的输出方面开发的专业知识，例如视频模型如何处理运动、图像模型如何处理构图或语音模型如何处理口型同步。

Runway 已经为其代理产品构建了智能层，这是 Runway 在 5 月份推出的对话式 AI 创意合作伙伴，旨在帮助将文本提示转变为完全编辑的多镜头视频和营销活动。

Maggio 表示，Runway 媒体路由器采用了 Runway 为自己的产品构建的相同路由技术，并将其打包供外部开发人员使用。

Runway 今天的战略反映了当前生成媒体格局的分散性和竞争性，以及初创公司需要多大程度的扩张和转型才能保持竞争力。 Runway 的最后一个 AI 视频模型发布 - Gen 4.5 - 是在 12 月。 当时，该模型在排行榜上名列前茅，超越了谷歌等现有企业的类似模型。 同月，《Runway》发布了其首款世界模特。

除了 5 月份升级视频编辑模型 Aleph 2.0 之外，Runway 几个月来没有推出新的专用前沿视频模型。 （TechCrunch 已询问该初创公司计划何时发布 Gen 5。） 如今，虽然 Aleph 2.0 根据 Artificial Analysis 的数据跻身领先的视频编辑模型之列，但该公司的文本到视频和图像到视频模型不再领先。 排在前 20 名的是谷歌、中国字节跳动和阿里巴巴等重量级企业的模型。

Media Router 并没有要求开发人员将赌注押在单一模型上以保持领先地位，而是假设最好的模型将继续变化 - 并且它使 Runway 保持在游戏中，以便它可以继续在前沿发展。 如果不是最好的新人工智能模型，那么就是最好的编排层。

Runway 的联合创始人兼联合首席执行官 Anastasis Germanidis 承认，这家初创公司长期以来主要以“最终用户部分”而闻名，但它必须构建一个完整的堆栈才能实现这一目标，其中包括开发人员平台、创意工具套件以及底层的推理层。 他表示，公司发现越来越多的公司对 Runway 的兴趣越来越浓厚，希望能够覆盖该堆栈的各个部分。

“底层需要出色的模型，但编排变得越来越重要，因为人们正在使用这些模型构建整个营销活动，或者他们正在利用这些模型构建完整的多场景生成，”Germanidis 告诉 TechCrunch。 “这是我们越来越需要构建的东西——位于纯像素模型之上的智能层。 路由器是让用户受益的一种方式。”

或者正如 Maggio 更广泛地说的那样：“如果你仔细观察 Runway 自 2018 年以来一直在做的一件事，那就是我们非常专注于研究，同时为我们认为的空间发展方向进行建设。”

有敏感提示或机密文件吗？ 丽贝卡·贝兰 (Rebecca Bellan) 正在报道人工智能行业的内部运作，从塑造其未来的公司到受其决策影响的人们。 通过 Signal（rebeccabellan.491）或通过非工作设备发送电子邮件（rebecca.bellan@techcrunch.com）安全地、不记录地联系她。

当您通过我们文章中的链接购买时，我们可能会赚取少量佣金。 这并不影响我们的编辑独立性。
